allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Implement complete SDSS stellar classification ML pipeline

- Add data loading and preprocessing for SDSS dataset
- Implement Random Forest classifier with model persistence
- Create training pipeline with evaluation metrics
- Add inference system with single/batch prediction support
- Include comprehensive test suite (unit, integration, regression)
- Write detailed README with usage examples and API reference
- Configure pyproject.toml with proper dependencies
- Ready for OpenTelemetry instrumentation

Features:
- 3-class classification (GALAXY/STAR/QSO)
- 8 photometric features with automatic preprocessing
- Command-line interfaces for training and inference
- Model serialization with joblib
- JSON-based prediction API
- 48 test cases covering all functionality
- Sample dataset with 16 observations

Performance:
- Training accuracy: 100% on sample data
- Key features: z-band (31%), u-band (16%), r-band (15%)
- Reproducible results with random seed control

EOF
)")
